hero.tagline: I craft fast, beautiful, and purposeful digital experiences that make an impact.

about.label: About Me
about.headline: I build things that live on the web.
about.bio1: A passionate full-stack developer with a keen eye for design and a love for clean, performant code. I specialize in building web applications that are not just functional, but delightful to use.
about.bio2: With years of experience across the stack, I bring ideas from concept to production — shipping products that are fast, accessible, and maintainable.
about.bio3: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open source, or refining my craft one pull request at a time.

contact.label: Let's Talk
contact.headline: Have a project in mind?
contact.sub: I'm open to freelance projects, collaborations, and full-time opportunities. Let's build something great together.

seo.title: Portfolio
seo.description: Full-Stack Developer & UI Engineer. Building fast, beautiful, and purposeful digital experiences.
